name: Chat Interface
summary: The chat UI domain for interacting with AI agents. Includes message rendering with markdown and images, a rich text input with slash commands and image uploads, visual tool cards for agent actions, interactive question panels, and thinking state indicators.
goals: Render agent messages with rich content including markdown, code blocks, and images
Provide a rich text input supporting image upload, slash commands, and keyboard shortcuts
Display agent tool use as visual card components with collapsible details
Support interactive agent tools like AskUserQuestion and Todo tracking

design.overview: MessageRenderer uses react-markdown with GFM for rich text. Tool events are transformed into a tree structure (buildEventTree) and rendered as specific card components. RichTextInput is a ContentEditable div with custom hooks for slash commands, image input, and Emacs keybindings.

acceptanceCriteria.given: Agent panel is open with an active agent
acceptanceCriteria.when: the agent sends messages with mixed content
acceptanceCriteria.then: all content types (text, code, images, tool events) are rendered correctly

end-to-end.when: the response includes text, code blocks, and tool use
end-to-end.then: all content types render correctly in the chat panel

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
